description: A merchandising team member needs to reset a section of the store according to a new planogram.

nodes.task_description: Access the new planogram for the 'healthy snacks' aisle on a tablet.

expected_outcome.value: The merchandiser can view the visual layout and product placement guide.

nodes.task_description: Remove existing products from the shelves and rearrange the shelving as specified in the planogram.

expected_outcome.value: The physical shelf setup is adjusted to match the new layout.

nodes.task_description: Place the products on the shelves in the exact locations and quantities shown in the planogram, and add new price labels.

expected_outcome.value: The aisle is successfully reset to the new corporate merchandising standard.
